top_signals.title: Why Dana White thinks much more of UFC's future will be Power Slap and boxing
top_signals.summary: UFC president and CEO Dana White predicted that Power Slap may become as big as his flagship fighting sport at the Game Plan conference in New York.

top_signals.title: Fanatics CEO Michael Rubin on two sports businesses his multibillion-dollar conglomerate won't enter
top_signals.summary: Fanatics has become one of the most influential companies in sports, building out a massive merchandise, collectibles and sports gambling platform.
